channel.title: Context Engineering Daily - Multimodal Context
channel.description: Latest Multimodal Context news in Context Engineering

item.title: Gemma 4 Technical Report
item.description: arXiv:2607.02770v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We introduce Gemma 4, a new generation of open-weight, natively multimodal language models in the Gemma model family. Designed to advance compute efficiency and reasoning, the Gemma 4 model suite features dense and Mixture-of-Experts architectures, ra...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> model, multimodal, arxiv, memory, image | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)

item.title: iFLYTEK-Embodied-Omni Technical Report
item.description: arXiv:2607.02542v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: General-purpose embodied agents must understand multimodal instructions, anticipate how their environment will evolve, and produce precise control actions over extended horizons. Existing approaches typically specialize in visual-language reasoning, v...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> model, demonstration, attention, multimodal, arxiv | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)

item.title: Federated Learning for Object Detection: Enabling Collaborative Drone Learning Without Centralizing Data
item.description: arXiv:2607.02636v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Object detection is a fundamental capability for AI-driven perception in safety-critical drone and edge-vision systems, including disaster response, operational security environments, infrastructure monitoring and defense applications. Robust model pe...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> model, arxiv, platform, image, vision | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 80%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)
